title: selaginella stellata
intro: Selaginella stellata, also known as Stellate Spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It is a low-growing, rhizomatous plant with stellate leaves that are often used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. Selaginella stellata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
